titleStmt.title: SII 15.612: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 612. (B.K. No. 248 of 1927-28.) SHIRŪR, BAGALKOT TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a wall in the maṇḍapa of the Rāmaliṅgasvāmin temple.

This is dated Śaka 1171, Saumya, Chaitra ba. 8, Monday, corresponding to 1249 A.D., April 7, the weekday being Wednesday. If, however, ba. is a mistake for śu. the details correspond to 1249 A.D., March 22, Monday f.d.t. °75.

It records a gift of money by Dēki-gāvuṇḍi and Suggi-gāvuṇḍi, the wives of Billaharaḷa-gāvuṇḍa, for feeding the ascetics in the maṭha of the god Mūlasthāna once a year, out of the interest accruing therefrom.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti sakavarṣa 1171 neya saumya saṁvatsarada caitra ba 8 sō
mavāradaṁdu hannirvvaru gāvuṁḍugaḷu pratipāḷisuvaṁtā
gi billaharaḷagāvuṁḍana maduvaḷige dēkigāvuṁḍi suggigāvuṁ
ḍiyuṁ śrī mūlasthānadēvara maṭadalli varśakoṁdu bāri tapōdhanargga
bhōjanavaṁ baḍḍiyiṁdaṁ māḍuvaṁtāgi biṭṭa Āṇi gadyā
ṇa Eraḍu 2
Digital edition of SII 15.612 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
